notes: MegaList index: tile/list view toggle + A-Z default sort + drag-and-drop reordering on tiles. The card grid is still there as Tile view; List view gives you one compact row per list with the same rename/duplicate/copy/delete actions. Drag any tile to move it — the new order persists and syncs across devices via cloud sync. A reset 'A-Z' button appears once you've reordered so you can snap back to alphabetical in one click.
